loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.subtitle: Privileges for regular customers and partners
loyalty.privilegedDesc: Up to 15% cashback on purchases, weekly promotions and access to private sales.
loyalty.privilegedClub: “Loyalty Club”: with steady purchases of 50+ points a month, after 6 months you receive premium brand sets as a gift.
loyalty.consultantDesc: A status for professional partners growing their own referral network.
loyalty.consultantLegal: Bonuses are paid only after registering as a sole proprietor (YTT) and signing an advertising-services contract — guaranteeing full legality of the business.
loyalty.pointsDesc: Wholesale turnover converts into points. The value of a point depends on the product category:
